title: SourceReference
description: Canonical cross-subsystem shape for referencing a DART-synthesized source block. Shared by DART provenance sidecars, Courseforge JSON-LD sourceReferences[], Trainforge chunk Source.source_references[], and evidence-arm enrichment (Waves 8-11). See plans/source-provenance/design.md for the full contract.

sourceId.description: Canonical DART block identifier: dart:{document_slug}#{block_id}. block_id is content-hash (16-hex) when TRAINFORGE_CONTENT_HASH_IDS=true, positional (s3_c0 style) otherwise.

role.description: primary=the block IS this source; contributing=the block draws from this source; corroborating=this source supports the claim but isn't synthesized from.

weight.description: Optional. Relative contribution weight when multi-source.

confidence.description: Optional. Ingestor's confidence that this mapping is correct.

pages.description: Optional. PDF page numbers. Populated when DART carries real page tracking; empty array or omitted when unknown.

extractor.description: Which extraction stage produced this block. DART emits one of the first five (per-block envelope). Wave 74+ courseforge subagents that synthesize or re-cite source references emit one of the agent identifiers (source-router from Wave 9 TF-IDF routing; content-generator from Wave 74 mailbox-dispatched content subagents).
